summary: Phase 1: Repository Setup — added comprehensive .gitignore covering build artifacts, macOS system files, scraped website data, IDE files, Xcode artifacts, and Swarm operational files. One coder revision after reviewer caught pattern anchoring issue. All 24 git check-ignore verifications passed.

Phase 2: UI Architecture & Design Cleanup — 6 tasks completed. Sources/ reorganized into 5 subdirectories. safeText() deduplicated into Utilities/String+Safe.swift. KeycapCard and StripedFill extracted from monolithic OverlayRootView (392→152 lines). keySpecs layout grid extracted to Layouts/VoyagerLayout.swift. ErrorState enum with onError callback and error banner added. DesignTokens.swift created with 8 enum categories replacing all hardcoded values.
